SessionStart.command: echo 'LLM Skills Kit loaded. Available commands: /positive:rewrite, /trim:audit, /trim:optimize, /toolsmith:audit, /toolsmith:optimize. Runtime skills active: forge (quality gate), contract (output specs), checkpoint (validation). Use /forge:off, /contract:off, /checkpoint:off to disable. Tier 3 skills (contrarian, anchor-point, grounding) are opt-in.'
